summary: Completed comprehensive testing of food delivery app. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend authentication, navigation, and admin dashboard functional. Found several UI integration issues that need attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Add to Cart buttons not found or not clickable
Form validation not working - no error messages on empty submit

integration_issues.issue: 401 errors in console logs during authenticated requests
Unable to add items to cart - buttons not functional
affected_selectors: Add to cart buttons on restaurant detail page

passed_tests: Frontend admin login and dashboard access
Frontend orders and profile page access
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Add to Cart functionality on restaurant detail pages, implement search and filter UI components on browse page, fix authentication token refresh issues causing 401 errors, and add form validation to registration page
